escalation.rationale: US-Iran ceasefire holding but fragile with continued Israeli strikes in Lebanon and Trump's NATO threats escalating diplomatic tensions.

ticker_items: US-Iran ceasefire under strain as Israel intensifies Lebanon strikes
Trump threatens NATO withdrawal after closed-door meeting with Rutte
Iran attacks Saudi oil pipeline despite ceasefire agreement
Ukraine faces Russian spring offensive with 400 drone strikes
Kuwait blames Iran for drone attack, Iran denies involvement

eastern_europe.description: Russian spring offensive continues with massive drone and missile barrage on civilian areas.

middle_east.description: Iranian drone strike hits Saudi Arabia's East-West oil pipeline pumping station.
Israel launches largest assault on Lebanon since invasion began, targeting Hezbollah positions.
Drone strike on Kuwaiti territory, Kuwait blames Iran and proxies.

middle_east.text: Remember Greenland, that big, poorly run, piece of ice!!!
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: Any ceasefire agreement to halt fighting between Tehran and Washington must explicitly include an end to Israeli military attacks in Lebanon
middle_east.speaker: Iranian officials
middle_east.title: Iranian Foreign Ministry

middle_east.text: NATO wasn't there when we needed them
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

observers.description: Ukrainian covert forces operating in western Libya under Western-endorsed deal used Libyan territory to strike Russian tanker in Mediterranean. Two Libyan officials confirmed the arrangement allowing Ukrainian operations from their soil.

Mitsui OSK Lines monitoring US-Iran ceasefire implementation before allowing vessels through Strait of Hormuz. Major shipping company taking cautious approach to testing strategic waterway amid fragile truce.

financial.notes: Energy prices may take months to normalize despite ceasefire due to continued Strait of Hormuz uncertainties.

update_log.text: Kuwait blames Iran for overnight drone strike, Iran denies responsibility
Israel launches largest Lebanon assault since invasion began, 254 killed in single day
Trump criticizes NATO over Iran war after closed-door meeting with Secretary General Rutte
Iranian drone reportedly strikes Saudi East-West oil pipeline pumping station
